diagrams.title: Gradient Descent Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how gradient descent moves from initial point toward minimum by taking steps opposite to gradient direction
elements: Arrows showing gradient direction (perpendicular to contours)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding iterative optimization and the role of gradient in finding minima

diagrams.title: Hessian Definiteness Types
diagrams.description: 3D surfaces showing different Hessian definiteness behaviors: positive definite (cup), negative definite (cap), indefinite (saddle)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing curvature at critical points and understanding optimization landscape

diagrams.title: Jacobian Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: Block diagram showing how Jacobian organizes first-order partial derivatives for vector-valued functions
elements: Input vector x with n components
Output vector f(x) with m components
m×n Jacobian matrix with partial derivatives
Each row represents gradient of one output component
diagrams.purpose: Understanding structure and computation of Jacobian for vector-valued functions

diagrams.title: Matrix Gradient Grid
diagrams.description: Visual representation of gradient of scalar function with respect to matrix, showing same-dimension output
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that matrix gradient has same dimensions as the matrix it differentiates with respect to
